name: Dane Cook
bio: Dane Cook is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for high-energy, observational, and often vulgar material. He built one of the first large online comedy fan bases via his personal website and Myspace in the 2000s, and his album Retaliation became the highest-charting comedy album in decades. He was the second comedian to sell out the main arena at Madison Square Garden.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up in Boston-area clubs
Breakthrough TV appearance on Comedy Central Premium Blend
Releases debut album Harmful If Swallowed
Album Retaliation goes multi-platinum; hosts SNL
Sells out Madison Square Garden arena

accolades: Retaliation: highest-charting comedy album in 28 years, certified platinum
Second comedian to sell out Madison Square Gardens arena
Rolling Stone Hot Comic of the Year (2007)

specials.t: Rough Around the Edges: Live from Madison Square Garden
